creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
According to bofh, the list of OpenSSL 3.0 failing ports is smaller now than it was previously: https://pkg.bofh.network/jail.html?mastername=MAIN-default-openssl3 .
Another exp-run should be done, but at this point... we're 4 months away from the official EOL date for OpenSSL 1.1. Ports that don't work need to be deny listed/marked broken with OpenSSL 3.0 and bugs need to be filed for issues so maintainers act, because the clock is ticking and this upgrade needs to happen for 14.0-RELEASE.
